title: rhododendron rosmarinifolium var. album
intro: Rhododendron rosmarinifolium var. album is a rare and unique variety of rhododendron, characterized by its white, rosemary-like leaves and showy pink flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron rosmarinifolium var. album include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and its herbal preparations have been used in folk medicine for centuries.
